betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6ME Interface Terminal§f

§aRemote configuration of ME Interfaces.§f

The §bME Interface Terminal§f allows remote management of §bME Interfaces§f across the network. View and modify interface configurations without walking to each block.

§6Specifications§f:
§b•§f Channels: §e1§f
§b•§f Function: §abind and configure§f ME Interfaces remotely
§b•§f Range: §9network-wide§f

§6How to Use§f:
§b1.§f Right-click an §bME Interface§f to bind it
§b2.§f Access the bound interface from anywhere via the Terminal
§b3.§f Modify configuration (filter, priority, etc.) from the Terminal
§b4.§f Useful for large factories with many Interfaces

§6Also Includes§f:
The §bInterface Configuration Terminal§f for configuring §bfluid interfaces§f — a single block can handle both item and fluid interface management.

§6Strategic Role§f:
For networks with §bdozens of interfaces§f scattered across a large base, the Interface Terminal is a §9game-changer§f. Without it, you must walk to each interface to change its filter or priority.

§eTip§f: Place an §bInterface Terminal§f near your §9main crafting area§f to manage interfaces across the whole base.
